violations.text: Candy packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Candy was relocated behind the counter during time of inspection. Establishment must not make candy available for self-service until labels are made. Please email inspector proof of correction. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025
